_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: we performed untargeted metabolomics and stable isotope labeling...we saw a ∼2.5X increase in total TG species in NF1-45 cells
details: Successfully performed untargeted metabolomics and stable isotope labeling to define the NF1-deficient metabolome, detecting increased TG levels (~2.5X increase) and other lipid species
